title: ウララ的トレーニング

text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since Haru Urara's training
started. I've learned many things about her in that
time.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! What big footprints! I wonder who these
are from?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: They're way bigger than my feet! They must've been left by a giant!

First off, she's very easily distracted. She can't
concentrate on any one thing for long. And on
top of that...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah, sorry! I'm supposed to be jogging, right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm gonna do one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two! One, two!
She'll apologize once she gets scolded, but...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ha! Ha! Ha! One, two! One, two! One, two...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? What's all that noise? Is something
happening somewhere?

She's going to get distracted and run to whatever
is more exciting again. It seems training her right
now is pointless.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oooh, that Urara! She's scampering off during training again!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That really is her worst habit, huh? La-di-dah over
here, Ura-di-dah over there...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
In all seriousness though... Shouldn't we do
something?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If she keeps neglecting training because she can't
focus, it's really going to hurt her in the long run...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You're worried about her? You're such a softie.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
She's like that in our dorm too! Of course I'm
concerned!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, Urara likes having fun. If she sees something
interesting, she just wanders off towards it...
That's just who she is.

Apparently, Haru Urara's capriciousness is
well-known even among her classmates.

I'll need to know more about Haru Urara before I
can come up with a plan for training her.

I give myself some time to think it over. One day
on break, I visit the shopping district and...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Apples! Get your apples here! They're
SUPER yummy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
They're sweet and suuuper juicy! They'll melt in
your mouth! Give 'em a try!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Wanna try one of these apples?
They're cheap!
choice_data_list: Are you helping the store out?
Are you helping the store out?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I like volunteering!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is this a friend of yours, Urara? Then this
one's on the house!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah! This is my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: A trainer, huh... Wait, a trainer?! And they're yours?!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Oh my goodness! Everyone! Group meeting!
Come on!

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Wow! So Urara finally has a trainer! How
wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Happy Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
You can't enter races without first making a
debut, right? Oh, I was so worried! But this solves
everything!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, so please don't worry anymore! I'm gonna
work really hard!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Of course you will! You're always bringing us joy.
You have the whole shopping district's full
support!

text_block_list.name: Earnest Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Please train her well! She can be a little
scatterbrained, but she's a hard worker!

text_block_list.name: Loving Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Take good care of her, okay?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm counting on you, Trainer!
The shopkeepers seem to adore Haru Urara. I've learned something new about her.

After that, in exchange for looking out for Haru
Urara, the shopkeepers gather to give me a
bunch of their wares for free.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! They gave you so much! I'll give you a hand!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: It's fine! I like helping!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whoa, these really are heavy! But I can do it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two! One, two...

She tries her best to carry one of the bags that's
practically half her size. You can tell the task has
her full... attention...

I think I just found the perfect way to get Haru
Urara to focus!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? We're gonna train at the shopping district?
choice_data_list: It's not training, it's a contest!
It's not training, it's a contest!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh?! A contest?!
choice_data_list: First is the "carry the apples" contest.
First is the "carry the apples" contest.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
"Carry the apples"? Ooh, what do I have to do for
that?

With the help of the shopkeepers, I plan out a
training regimen that simulates her daily life of
helping in the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee. I see, so the winner is whoever can carry
the most apples the fastest!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: That sounds super fun! I wanna give it a go!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee! I won't lose!

After that, I successfully hone her skills by
disguising my training as various contests. I'm
confident this will prove effective.

With this method, getting her to focus is no
longer a problem. This is going to make me really
sore later, but I'm just going to have to suck it up.
